deployment.author: Rui Tracanas
deployment.message:
fix: exclude IEnumerable<string> computed properties from Azure Table Storage serialization
Azure.Data.Tables SDK tries to serialize all public properties including the computed Teams, Rosters, and Groups IEnumerable<string> properties. Table Storage does not support collection types and returns InvalidInput (400). The actual data is already stored in TeamsInString/RostersInString/GroupsInString. Add [IgnoreDataMember] to suppress serialization of the computed properties.
